ddls:
CREATE TABLE "registers" (
  "register_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each register */,
  "register_name" TEXT /* Name of the register */,
  "bit_field" INTEGER /* Bit field representing the register's configuration */,
  "reset_value" INTEGER /* Reset value of the register */,
  "register_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the register type */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the register category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the register */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the register was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("register_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registers_register_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("register_type_id") REFERENCES register_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registers_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES register_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_controls" (
  "control_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access control setting */,
  "register_id" INTEGER /* ID of the register the setting belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user with access control settings */,
  "hw_access" TEXT /* Hardware access control setting */,
  "sw_access" TEXT /* Software access control setting */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read, write, execute) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("control_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_controls_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_controls_register_id FOREIGN KEY ("register_id") REFERENCES registers ("register_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., hardware engineer, software engineer, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "register_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "register_id" INTEGER /* ID of the register being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the register */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the register was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the register */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID for tracking user sessions */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_register_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_register_access_logs_register_id FOREIGN KEY ("register_id") REFERENCES registers ("register_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "register_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each register version */,
  "register_id" INTEGER /* ID of the register the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the register configuration */,
  "config_data" TEXT /* Configuration data for the register */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_register_versions_register_id FOREIGN KEY ("register_id") REFERENCES registers ("register_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_register_versions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "register_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each register type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the register type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the register type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the register type is active or deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "register_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each register document */,
  "register_id" INTEGER /* ID of the register the document belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the document in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., PDF, DOCX) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_register_documents_register_id FOREIGN KEY ("register_id") REFERENCES registers ("register_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_register_documents_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "register_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each register category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the register category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the register category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the register category is active or deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)
